title: Tender Spiced British Ginger Stir-fry
description: A floral and tender hangover-cure dish featuring a blend of garam masala, bhuna spices, and other aromatic elements for an authentic Indian-inspired twist on traditional British ginger fare.

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons bhuna spice mix (cumin, coriander, cardamom)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced ginger, garam masala powder, and bhuna spice mix; stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
Add minced garlic to the pan; sauté for an additional minute until fragrant.
Toss in chopped onions and stir well with the spices. Cook for about 5 more minutes or until onions start to soften slightly.
Gradually add both broccoli florets and baby carrots into the wok, tossing to combine evenly with the spices and vegetables. Season lightly with salt as needed.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes or until all ingredients are tender but still crisp.
Stir in fresh cilantro just before serving; give a quick stir to mix through the dish.
